sentence: 那场学运影响了整整一代年轻人。
pinyin: Nà chǎng xué yùn yǐngxiǎng le zhěngzhěng yī dài niánqīngrén.
english: That student movement influenced an entire generation of young people.

sentence: 市政府加固了河堤以加强防洪能力。
pinyin: Shì zhèngfǔ jiāgù le hé dī yǐ jiāqiáng fáng hóng nénglì.
english: The city government reinforced the riverbanks to improve flood control capacity.

sentence: 狮子被称为动物界的王者。
pinyin: Shīzi bèi chēngwéi dòng wù jiè de wángzhě.
english: The lion is known as the king of the animal kingdom.

sentence: 医生给他开了预防性的药物。
pinyin: Yīshēng gěi tā kāi le yù fáng xìng de yàowù.
english: The doctor prescribed him preventive medication.

meaning: (of a married woman) to cheat on her husband; to have an affair
sentence: 邻居发现她在偷人，闹得满城风雨。
pinyin: Línjū fāxiàn tā zài tōu rén, nào de mǎn chéng fēng yǔ.
english: The neighbors found out she was having an affair, and it caused a huge scandal.
